title: 14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West
details: Experience the ultimate American adventure from the West Coast to the East Coast. Explore San Francisco, Yosemite National Park, Las Vegas, Los Angeles, Anaheim, New York, and Niagara Falls in one unforgettable journey. This all-in package includes airfare via EVA Air, hotel accommodations, guided sightseeing, admission fees, and a Filipino tour leader.

itinerary.day_details: Meet the group at NAIA Terminal 1 for check-in at EVA Air counter. Depart Manila and enjoy inflight amenities. Upon arrival in San Francisco, meet and greet with local guide and driver. Transfer for dinner, then proceed to hotel for check-in and overnight stay.

After breakfast, proceed for a full-day city tour including Golden Gate Bridge, Pier 39, Palace of Fine Arts, Lombard Street, City Hall, Coit Tower, Ferry Building, and free time at Ghirardelli Square.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day2_1771035140.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 03: San Francisco – Yosemite National Park – Fresno (Breakfast/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, depart for Fresno with a visit to the breathtaking Yosemite National Park. Enjoy scenic views and photo opportunities before transferring to hotel for dinner and overnight stay.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day3_1771035142.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 04: Fresno – Tejon Outlet – Las Vegas (Breakfast)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, travel toward Las Vegas with a shopping stop at Tejon Ranch Outlet. Continue to Las Vegas for hotel check-in and overnight stay.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day4_1771035148.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 05: Las Vegas – Grand Canyon – Hoover Dam (Breakfast)
itinerary.day_details: Morning excursion to the West Rim of the Grand Canyon and visit Hoover Dam. Return to Las Vegas for city highlights including Bellagio Fountain, Welcome to Fabulous Las Vegas Sign, The Strip, and free time for shopping.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day5_1771035152.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 06: Las Vegas – Los Angeles – Anaheim (Breakfast/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, depart for Los Angeles. Visit Hollywood Sign, Santa Monica Pier, Venice Canal, Historic District, TCL Chinese Theatre, Hollywood Walk of Fame, Los Angeles County Museum of Art, and Griffith Observatory. Continue to Anaheim for dinner and hotel check-in.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day6_1771035170.png

itinerary.day_details: Enjoy free time for shopping or optional tours to Disneyland or Universal Studios.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day7_1771035168.png

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, transfer to LAX Airport for domestic flight to New York. Upon arrival at JFK Airport, meet and greet assistance. Transfer to dinner and hotel check-in.
After breakfast, proceed for a full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Experience the majestic waterfalls including Cave of the Winds experience. Return to hotel.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day9_1771035176.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 10: Niagara – Woodbury Outlet – New York (Breakfast)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, travel back to New York with a shopping stop at Woodbury Common Premium Outlet before returning to the hotel.

Explore New York City including Statue of Liberty, Rockefeller Center, Chrysler Building, Wall Street, Empire State Building, Metropolitan Museum of Art, Brooklyn Bridge, Flatiron Building, Grand Central Terminal, and St. Patrick’s Cathedral.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day11_1771035181.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 12: New York City Tour – 9/11 Memorial (Breakfast)
itinerary.day_details: Visit the 9/11 Memorial & Museum, Central Park, Belmont Park Village, and Times Square. Enjoy free time for shopping.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/14D/12N Dream Holidays in USA 2026 – East Meets West/Day12_1771035213.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 13: Free Time – Transfer to JFK Airport (Breakfast)
itinerary.day_details: Enjoy breakfast and free time before evening transfer to JFK Airport for departure back to Manila.
Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Roundtrip economy airfare via EVA Air
Private coach transfers during the tour
Sightseeing tours and entrance fees as per itinerary
extra_details: Entrance fees included: Grand Canyon, Hoover Dam, Griffith Observatory, Cave of the Winds, 9/11 Memorial & Museum
Second downpayment: $400 per person after one month
Full payment required 45 days before departure
